backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for ERPVerse, including data types for companies, staff, roles, and user profiles, along with persistent state maps and query/update methods for managing company registration, staff profiles, and role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping implemented features (landing page portals, company setup, staff registration, dashboards) to their corresponding source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON file containing short summaries of two frontend source files: App.tsx (root routing/auth component) and StaffDashboard.tsx (staff dashboard page).
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the ERPVerse frontend, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages Internet Identity authentication state, portal mode (company vs. staff), and view routing, conditionally rendering the correct page based on auth status and backend data fetched via React Query hooks.
A display card component that renders detailed company information (tax number, sector, founding year, contact details, etc.) in a grid layout using icons and localized labels.
frontend/src/components/CompanyMembershi: A card component showing a staff member's company membership, including company name, ID, and role badge with color-coded styling, plus an 'Enter Company' button.
frontend/src/components/DashboardSidebar: A sidebar navigation component for the dashboard that renders nav items (Overview, Staff, Roles, Settings) with active state highlighting and supports both owner and staff panel modes.
frontend/src/components/EmployeeCodeDisp: Displays an employee code with a copy-to-clipboard button, showing a checkmark confirmation for 2 seconds after copying, using i18n labels.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header showing the ERPVerse logo, a language toggle, and an optional authenticated user name with logout button.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: Small toggle UI component that switches the app language between Turkish (TR) and English (EN) using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/PortalCard.tsx: Reusable card component for portal entry points, displaying an icon, title, feature list, and a login CTA button with gold or blue accent styling.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context providing language state (TR/EN), a translation lookup function, and persistence via localStorage with HTML lang attribute sync.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor via React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/logout functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for user profiles, employee codes, company CRUD, and staff management operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a dark navy and gold Tailwind CSS theme with custom CSS variables, utility component classes, and Google Fonts imports.
frontend/src/locales/en.json: English translation strings for the ERPVerse app, covering navigation, landing page, company setup, staff registration, dashboard, and common UI elements.
frontend/src/locales/tr.json: Turkish translation strings for the ERPVerse app, mirroring the structure of en.json with all UI text localized to Turkish.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/CompanyOwnerDashboard: Dashboard page for company owners that allows viewing company info, managing staff (add/remove), and updating staff roles via backend query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/CompanySetupPage.tsx: Form page for registering a new company, with validation and submission that calls the createCompany mutation and redirects on success.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page displaying the ERPVerse hero section, company and staff login portal cards, and feature highlights with Internet Identity login integration.
frontend/src/pages/StaffDashboard.tsx: React page for the staff dashboard showing a tabbed interface with the user's company memberships and profile info, including employee code copy functionality and role display.
frontend/src/pages/StaffRegistrationPage: React page for first-time staff registration, collecting name and title, saving the profile via mutation, and then displaying the generated 12-character employee code.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), OKLCH-based color palettes (navy, gold, semantic tokens), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for ERPVerse describing the multi-tenant ERP platform's architecture, existing implemented features, known issues, and planned ERP modules with Turkish/English support.
